title: Stage-2 pathway-node hypotheses — STAGE-3 CONSUMER PROPOSAL (not frozen)
description: OWNED AND EMITTED BY STAGE 2. Stage 3 is the CONSUMER. This is a consumer PROPOSAL pending the Stage-2 owner's agreement — NOT a frozen contract, and Stage 3 does not freeze Stage-2 contracts. A pathway node is INFERRED, never perturbed: it has no measured arm value, rank or evidence tier, it can never be an observed_perturbation, and it is never merged with a measured direct target. Each node states its OWN desired direction. Pathway evidence is ARM-SPECIFIC. Computed enrichment is NUMERIC and carries its statistic name, method, rounding rule, gene-set release/hash and universe binding; p/q are ABSENT unless a calibrated method is independently justified (inference_status=not_calibrated). Claude Science output is referenced by TYPED evidence record ID + hash — never embedded as a free-form object or string.

direct_run_id.description: A document naming a different run answers a different question and is refused.

direct_run_binding_sha256.description: Must equal the binding hash Stage 3 independently derives from the Direct run. A resealed hash is refused.

method.description: How the nodes were derived. Carried into provenance verbatim; Stage 3 does not interpret it.

pathway_source_release.description: REQUIRED. A pathway term's MEMBERSHIP changes between releases.

computed_enrichment.description: The COMPUTED enrichment. NUMERIC by design — a programmatically computed statistic is a number, and stringifying it would destroy it. Only this may support a node.

statistic_name.description: REQUIRED. Names WHAT the number is (e.g. hypergeometric_odds_ratio, gsea_normalized_enrichment_score). A bare number with no statistic name is uninterpretable.

enrichment_value.description: The computed statistic, NUMERIC. Not stringified.

inference_status.description: No calibrated null exists for this statistic, so no p/q may be emitted. See p_value/q_value below.

rounding_rule.description: REQUIRED and EXPLICIT (e.g. 'ieee754_float64_no_rounding', 'round_half_even_6dp'). Stage 3 reproduces the value under this rule; an unstated rounding rule makes the number irreproducible.

gene_set_release.description: REQUIRED. The gene-set release the statistic was computed against.

universe_binding.description: REQUIRED. An enrichment statistic is meaningless without the gene UNIVERSE it was computed against; the same overlap in a different universe is a different result.

p_value.description: ABSENT unless a later CALIBRATED method is independently justified. inference_status=not_calibrated means no calibrated null exists, and a p-value without one is not a p-value.

q_value.description: ABSENT unless a later CALIBRATED method is independently justified.

science_evidence_refs.description: TYPED references to Claude Science evidence records, by ID and content hash. Claude Science output is NEVER embedded as a free-form object or string in the computed artifact: an interpretation is not a computation, and an un-hashed blob cannot be verified or attributed. It never supports a node and never sets a direction.

items.description: One inferred gene, on ONE arm. It is not a measurement.

target_ensembl.description: An exact Ensembl accession. A gene symbol is not an accession and is refused.

desired_target_modulation.description: The direction THIS node wants, stated explicitly. NEVER inherited from the pathway, never copied from a sibling: two nodes of one pathway may want OPPOSITE directions.

evidence_status.description: CLOSED enum. What kind of computed evidence puts this gene in the pathway. A node with no stated evidence is a guess.

programmatic_evidence.description: ARM-SPECIFIC computed evidence for THIS node on THIS arm. Enrichment computed on one arm can NEVER support a node on the other.

enrichment_value.description: NUMERIC. A programmatically computed statistic is a number.

p_value.description: ABSENT unless a calibrated method is independently justified.

q_value.description: ABSENT unless a calibrated method is independently justified.

gene_set_release.description: Inline alternative to parent_enrichment_ref: repeat the COMPLETE gene-set release + universe binding here.

science_evidence_refs.description: TYPED references to Claude Science evidence records, by ID and content hash. Claude Science output is NEVER embedded as a free-form object or string in the computed artifact: an interpretation is not a computation, and an un-hashed blob cannot be verified or attributed. It never supports a node and never sets a direction.

contributing_perturbations.description: The MEASURED Direct perturbations supporting this node ON THIS ARM. A node that cites none — or cites only perturbations absent from this screen or on the OTHER arm — is retained with an explicit disposition and barred from every drug edge.

target_ensembl.description: A gene the Direct screen actually perturbed.

desired_arm.description: MUST match the node's arm. Wrong-arm inheritance is refused.

parent_enrichment_ref.description: HASH-BOUND reference to the parent computed enrichment. Either give this, OR repeat the complete gene-set release + universe binding inline in programmatic_evidence. A node with NEITHER has a dangling parent and is REFUSED — a claim with nothing behind it is not a hypothesis. Every field must match the parent enrichment record exactly; a partial or mismatched reference is refused.

evidence_status.description: CLOSED enum. What kind of computed evidence puts this gene in the pathway. A node with no stated evidence is a guess.
